caption: A close-up sequence shows the engine bay of a vehicle parked outdoors near green foliage. The engine is partially disassembled, revealing metallic components, wiring, and rubber hoses. In the initial views, the camera focuses on the top of the engine, showing a silver valve cover with red ignition wires and a black air intake hose. A ratchet and socket wrench rest on a black plastic surface to the right. As the perspective shifts, the camera pans across the engine compartment, revealing more of the silver intake manifold and various connectors. The surrounding environment includes glimpses of a white car part and green grass. No people are visible in the frames, and there is no legible on-screen text or logos. The sequence captures a detailed look at the mechanical components of the engine from several different angles.
